rights.text: Your probation cannot last longer than 6 months — beyond that, you have a permanent role.
Your statutory notice grows with tenure; the employer cannot give you less than the law requires.
A non-compete must protect a legitimate business interest and be reasonable in scope and duration.
You are entitled to 11 consecutive hours of daily rest and 36 consecutive hours of weekly rest.

support.name: Unionen
support.description: Sweden's largest white-collar union — free advice for members
